documentation.description:
Ada_Modbus.Transport.LwIP - LwIP socket transport for embedded systems
Copyright (c) 2026 Florian Fischer
SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT

Provides TCP transport using LwIP sockets API.
Designed for Cortex-M4 and similar embedded targets.

Prerequisites:
- LwIP configured with LWIP_SOCKET=1 (BSD sockets API)
- lwip/sockets.h available

record_types.name: TCP_Connection

subprograms.name: Accept_Connection
Connect

parameters.name: IP_Addr
parameters.description: IP address in network byte order

subprograms.name: Listen
Make_IP_Addr
subprograms.code: function Make_IP_Addr (A, B, C, D : Unsigned_8) return Unsigned_32

subprograms.name: Receive
Send
